description: Builder-only hardening and governance tasks must show strong planning, evidence, tests, and operator handoff.

rubric_dimensions.name: planning_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Planning artifacts must be complete and reviewable.

rubric_dimensions.name: implementation_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Implementation should land coherently or fail for explicit reasons.

rubric_dimensions.name: test_adequacy
rubric_dimensions.description: Local validation should be present and passing.

rubric_dimensions.name: evidence_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Judge and evidence artifacts must be complete.

rubric_dimensions.name: operator_handoff_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Run summary and operator artifacts should support handoff.

rubric_dimensions.name: recovery_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Failures should classify cleanly and carry recovery intent.

known_failure_cases: executor transport interruption without a postmortem or taxonomy
missing evidence bundle or judge artifact
